target.name: Silicon Box
target.founder: Han Byung Joon, Sehat Sutardja, Weili Dai

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $200M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 24.2x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Silicon Box is a Series B semiconductor company founded by Han Byung Joon, Sehat Sutardja, and Weili Dai, having raised $200M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comparable universe of 8 private-stage peers in the Chips & Semiconductors sector, including Positron AI, Etched, d-Matrix, and Substrate, alongside 3 public semiconductor benchmarks (ALAB, NVDA, AMD).

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis uses the $200M total raised as a baseline and applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical for Series B advancement, implying a $380M valuation. Peer-median analysis across 6 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yields a $1.0B median, with a range spanning $500M to $5.0B. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied because the target's revenue is not disclosed. Public Semiconductors command a median 24.2x P/S multiple, but this method lacks necessary operating data.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $323M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $690M. The gap between methods reflects material uncertainty around growth trajectory relative to peers. Stage-progression anchors conservatively to capital deployed; peer-median reflects market-clearing rates for similarly-staged chip infrastructure plays but exhibits wide dispersion. Revenue visibility and path to meaningful margins remain key variables that would narrow this range.
